# Templates (skysthelimit)

Copy from here when creating work. Prefer **Linear** for tracking; put durable technical truth in **git**.

| Template | Use for |
|----------|---------|
| [DESIGN.md](./DESIGN.md) | Stitch / design-system SSOT (also live root `DESIGN.md`) |
| [ISSUE_FEATURE.md](./ISSUE_FEATURE.md) | New feature Linear issue body |
| [ISSUE_BUG.md](./ISSUE_BUG.md) | Bug Linear issue body |
| [PLAN.md](./PLAN.md) | Implementation plan (`docs/superpowers/plans/`) |
| [HANDOFF.md](./HANDOFF.md) | Agent handoff prompt |
| [ARCHITECTURE.md](./ARCHITECTURE.md) | Architecture-loop decision record |
| [PR.md](./PR.md) | Pull request description |
| [LINEAR_STATUS.md](./LINEAR_STATUS.md) | Project status update body |

Naming: see [`docs/NAMING.md`](../NAMING.md).  
Process: see [`docs/LINEAR_OS.md`](../LINEAR_OS.md).  
Agent OS: see [`docs/AGENT_OS.md`](../AGENT_OS.md) · kernel `.agents/AGENTS.md`.
